content:
# Microfacies Analysis

**Summary**: The study of the small-scale sedimentary and biological features of a rock unit.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1996-matter|Matter, 1996]] used microfacies-analysis to identify twelve distinct types including calcareous and siliceous phosphorite.

- [[1992-el-sahn|El-Sahn, 1992]] analyzed microfacies to determine paleoenvironmental conditions.

## Instruments and Software



- [[1992-el-sahn|El-Sahn, 1992]] analyzed microfacies to determine paleoenvironmental conditions.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Twelve microfacies types were recognized, including calcitic and silicified varieties. ([[1996-matter|Matter, 1996, p. 46]])

- Five distinct microfacies were recognized in the succession. ([[1992-el-sahn|El-Sahn, 1992, p. 13]])
